name: vidflow
description: Desktop downloader for YouTube, TikTok and Facebook videos powered by Electron, React and yt-dlp.
author: VidFlow Team <support@vidflow.local>

scripts.build:backend:linux: node scripts/run-python.js -m PyInstaller --noconfirm --clean --name vidflow-backend --distpath resources/python/linux --workpath build/pyinstaller --specpath build/pyinstaller backend/runner.py
scripts.package: npm run build:renderer && node scripts/run-electron-builder.js --config electron-builder.json
scripts.package:linux: npm run build:backend:linux && npm run build:renderer && node scripts/run-electron-builder.js --linux AppImage deb --config electron-builder.json
scripts.package:win: npm run build:renderer && node scripts/run-electron-builder.js --win nsis --config electron-builder.json
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:renderer
